meaning: n.[动]獒,大驯犬(大型猛犬之一种)
examples: The other names of this dog are Chinese pug, Dutch bulldog, Dutch mastiff and Mini mastiff and its country of origin is China.
Homo sapiens and bull mastiff-are they 'highly comparable'?
Hercules is an English Mastiff and has a 38 inch neck and weighs 282 pounds.
It is the first time soldiers travelling in a Mastiff have died, the Ministry of Defence said.
The city's pet-loving Bohemians are obsessed by the horrible death of a woman mauled by a mastiff.
